mainEntity.name: How much does window cleaning cost in Las Vegas?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most residential window cleanings in Las Vegas range from $150 to $400 depending on the number of windows, the home's height, and whether you want screens and tracks included. Commercial storefronts are typically priced per visit on a recurring contract. We give every quote in writing so there are no surprises.

mainEntity.name: Do you clean second-story exterior windows?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We use water-fed poles and extension ladders for two-story homes. For homes taller than two stories, we send a tech to evaluate before quoting.

mainEntity.name: Will my windows streak in the Las Vegas heat?

acceptedAnswer.text: This is the most common worry, and it is a fair one — water dries fast here. We use professional squeegees, fresh distilled-water mixes, and we work in the right order (top down, dry as we go). If you ever see a streak after we leave, call us back and we fix it.

mainEntity.name: Do you clean the screens too?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We remove the screens, rinse them down, and reinstall them as part of every standard window cleaning. If a screen is damaged we tell you before doing anything to it.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer recurring window cleaning?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — monthly, bi-monthly, quarterly, or twice a year. Recurring clients get priority scheduling and a small repeat-customer discount.
